commit.subject: LU-18687 libcfs: remove top-level libcfs directory
commit.message:
LU-18687 libcfs: remove top-level libcfs directory

The remains of the libcfs directory can be folded into
lustre_compat. libcfs.ko (the module) will remain. However,
the functional parts of libcfs will live on in Lustre/LNet
proper. The compatibility code will live in lustre_compat.
